title: chamaecrista eitenorum var. regana
intro: Chamaecrista eitenorum var. regana is a variant of the Chamaecrista eitenorum plant, a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Brazil, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and combat bacterial infections, thus providing health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced pain, and enhanced immune function. Chamaecrista eitenorum var. regana can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be taken as teas, tinctures, or added to topical creams and ointments.
